name: Penne with Tomato, Cream, and Five Cheeses
recipeIngredient: 1 cup chopped canned tomatoes in heavy puree
1/2 cup freshly grated Pecorino Romano (1 1/2 ounces)
2 small fresh Mozzarella cheeses, sliced (1/4 pound)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 500°F.
2. Bring 5 quarts of salted water to a boil in a stockpot.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine all ingredients except the penne and butter. Stir well to combine.
4. Drop the penne into the boiling water and parboil for 4 minutes. Drain in a colander and add to the mixture, tossing to combine.
5. Divide the pasta mixture among six to eight individual, shallow, ceramic gratin dishes (1 1/2 to 2 cups capacity). Dot with the butter and bake until bubbly and brown on top, 7 to 10 minutes.
